title: PresenceStatus/set and PresenceStatus/changes + fixture tests
description:
Implement PresenceStatus/set and PresenceStatus/changes in methods/misc.rs:
- PresenceStatus/set: update presence (online/away/busy/invisible/offline), statusText, statusEmoji, receiptSharing
- PresenceStatus/changes: poll for account-level presence state changes
- receiptSharing field: when false, server suppresses all outbound Peer/receipt calls (bidirectional opt-out)
- Fixture tests for both

Fixture files: tests/fixtures/presence_status_set.json, presence_status_changes.json
